description_long: This object consists of two pieces of sushi, each featuring a mound of white rice topped with a slice of pinkish-red fish, likely tuna, and a small green garnish, possibly wasabi or a herb, on top. The sushi pieces are neatly arranged side by side on a rectangular wooden serving board with a natural wood grain finish. The rice appears to be compact and slightly glossy, while the fish slices are smooth and slightly translucent, indicating freshness. The green garnish adds a pop of color and visual interest to the otherwise simple presentation. The wooden board is clean and unadorned, providing a traditional and elegant backdrop for the sushi. Overall, the presentation is minimalist and typical of high-quality Japanese cuisine.
description: Two pieces of tuna nigiri sushi with green garnish are placed on a rectangular wooden serving board. The sushi features glossy white rice and smooth pink fish slices.
description_view_0: Front view showing both pieces of sushi side by side on the wooden board, with the green garnish clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the rounded end of the sushi, highlighting the thickness of the fish slices and the compact rice base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of both sushi pieces, with the wooden board's grain more visible and the garnish less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the length of the sushi pieces and the layering of fish over rice, with one piece partially obscured.
